title: Chat panel: streaming renderer, thinking blocks, tool call cards
analysis: Task 142 adds rich streaming display components to the ChatPanel. The codebase already has substantial implementation on main: claudeStore.ts provides rAF-based delta batching (60fps), FIFO tool-result matching, session status management, and abort/clear. The ChatPanel.tsx orchestrates message display with MessageGroup rendering ThinkingBlock + ToolCallCards + StreamingText in correct DOM order. ThinkingBlock shows animated pulsing dots during streaming and a collapsible section after completion. StreamingText renders markdown via renderMarkdown() with a blinking cursor. ToolCallCard has read/write icon coloring, status indicators (spinner/checkmark/X), expandable details with JSON or DiffView for source updates. AbortButton replaces SendButton when sessionStatus !== 'idle'. Tests exist across 6 test files: claudeStore.test.ts (579 lines, 50+ cases covering rAF batching, FIFO matching, status transitions, error classification), ChatPanel.test.tsx (305 lines covering MessageGroup composition, context integration, abort visibility), ToolCallCard.test.tsx (140 lines covering status states, expand/collapse, diff view), plus dedicated ThinkingBlock, StreamingText, and AbortButton tests. Gaps identified: (1) resultSummary() only handles reify_get_parameters but not reify_get_constraints — task spec says 'e.g., 2 violated constraints', (2) ChatPanel abort button tests cover 'responding'/'idle' but not 'thinking'/'tool-calling' explicitly, (3) no high-volume streaming performance test (current rAF test uses 10 deltas; task says 'rendering doesn't block at high token rates'). Plan structures TDD steps for the full feature set; steps where both test and impl exist will be verified-and-passed quickly by the executor.

prerequisites.description: Install GUI dependencies: cd gui && npm install (node_modules not present in worktree)
Verify vitest runs: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose src/__tests__/claudeStore.test.ts to confirm test infrastructure works

steps.description: Write failing tests for claudeStore delta batching: (a) buffers multiple text_delta events and flushes on rAF, (b) buffers thinking_delta events, (c) done event flushes immediately without waiting for rAF, (d) abort clears pending buffer. File: gui/src/__tests__/claudeStore.test.ts — verify 'rAF delta batching' describe block exists with these 3 cases.

Implement rAF delta batching in claudeStore.ts: textBuffer/thinkingBuffer arrays, scheduleFlush() with requestAnimationFrame, cancelAndFlush() for terminal events, cancelAndClear() for abort. Verify step-1 tests pass.

Write failing tests for claudeStore session status transitions: text_delta sets 'responding', thinking_delta sets 'thinking', tool_call sets 'tool-calling', done/error/abort reset to 'idle'. File: gui/src/__tests__/claudeStore.test.ts — verify handleOutboundMessage tests exist.
Implement session status transitions in claudeStore handleOutboundMessage: set sessionStatus on each event type. Verify step-3 tests pass.

Write failing tests for claudeStore tool call FIFO matching: (a) tool_call adds ToolCallInfo with status='pending', (b) tool_result marks first pending tool with matching name as 'complete', (c) sequential same-tool calls resolve in order, (d) mixed tool names match correctly, (e) locally-unique IDs. File: gui/src/__tests__/claudeStore.test.ts — verify 'tool_result FIFO matching' describe block.
Implement FIFO tool-result matching in claudeStore: tool_call pushes to toolCalls array with generated ID, tool_result finds first pending call with matching toolName. Verify step-5 tests pass.

Write failing tests for StreamingText component: (a) renders text content, (b) shows blinking cursor when streaming=true, (c) hides cursor when streaming=false, (d) bold markdown renders as <strong>, (e) code block renders as <pre><code>, (f) inline code renders as <code>, (g) empty text renders without errors. File: gui/src/__tests__/StreamingText.test.tsx.

Implement StreamingText component: createMemo for renderMarkdown(text), div with innerHTML for prose, Show for cursor span with blink animation. Plus StreamingText.module.css with prose styles, cursor animation. Verify step-7 tests pass.

Write failing tests for ThinkingBlock component: (a) complete=false shows thinking-indicator with animated dots, (b) complete=false does NOT show text content, (c) complete=true shows thinking-block section, (d) complete=true text is collapsed by default, (e) clicking header expands to show text, (f) clicking again collapses. File: gui/src/__tests__/ThinkingBlock.test.tsx.

Implement ThinkingBlock component: Show when=complete with fallback indicator (pulsing dots), collapsed section with createSignal(false) for expanded, click handler toggles. Plus ThinkingBlock.module.css with pulse animation, muted styling. Verify step-9 tests pass.

Write failing tests for ToolCallCard component: (a) renders with data-testid, (b) displays tool name, (c) spinner when pending, (d) checkmark when complete, (e) X when error, (f) click expands to show input JSON, (g) read tools have blue icon, (h) write tools have orange icon. File: gui/src/__tests__/ToolCallCard.test.tsx.

Implement ToolCallCard: header with icon (data-tool-type), toolName, paramSummary, status indicator (spinner/char), expandable details with JSON. Plus ToolCallCard.module.css with icon colors, spinner animation. Verify step-11 tests pass.

Write failing tests for ToolCallCard DiffView integration: (a) reify_update_source when complete shows DiffView on expand, (b) DiffView receives before from toolInput and after from result, (c) non-update tools show JSON details not DiffView, (d) 'View diff' summary text visible for update_source. File: gui/src/__tests__/ToolCallCard.test.tsx — verify 'diff view for source updates' describe block.

Implement DiffView rendering in ToolCallCard: isSourceUpdateDiff() check, extractDiffBefore/extractDiffAfter helpers, conditional DiffView vs JSON details. resultSummary returns 'View diff' for update_source. Verify step-13 tests pass.

Write failing tests for ToolCallCard result summaries: (a) reify_get_parameters with array result shows 'N parameters', (b) reify_get_constraints with array result shows 'N constraints' count. File: gui/src/__tests__/ToolCallCard.test.tsx — add test case for constraint summary.
Extend resultSummary() in ToolCallCard to handle reify_get_constraints: if result is array, return `${result.length} constraints`. Verify step-15 tests pass.

Write failing tests for AbortButton component: (a) renders with data-testid, (b) calls onAbort on click, (c) has aria-label='Abort generation', (d) contains stop icon. File: gui/src/__tests__/AbortButton.test.tsx.
Implement AbortButton: button with data-testid, aria-label, onClick calls onAbort, stop icon span. Plus AbortButton.module.css with hover-to-red transition. Verify step-17 tests pass.

Write failing tests for abort button visibility in ChatPanel across all session states: (a) visible when 'thinking', (b) visible when 'responding', (c) visible when 'tool-calling', (d) NOT visible when 'idle', (e) send button visible when 'idle'. File: gui/src/__tests__/ChatPanel.test.tsx — add test cases for 'thinking' and 'tool-calling' states.
Verify ChatPanel conditional rendering: isActive() returns true for thinking/responding/tool-calling, Show when=isActive() renders AbortButton else SendButton. Verify step-19 tests pass.

Write failing tests for MessageGroup composition and ordering: (a) ThinkingBlock renders when thinkingText non-empty, (b) no ThinkingBlock when thinkingText empty, (c) ToolCallCard renders for each tool call, (d) StreamingText renders response, (e) DOM order: thinking before tool calls before streaming text. File: gui/src/__tests__/ChatPanel.test.tsx — verify MessageGroup describe block.
Implement MessageGroup: Show when=thinkingText for ThinkingBlock, For each=toolCalls for ToolCallCard, StreamingText with text/streaming props. Verify step-21 tests pass.

Write failing test for full ChatPanel event sequence integration: sendMessage, thinking_delta, text_delta(s), done — verify user message rendered, response text combined, thinking block appears as collapsed, session returns to idle. File: gui/src/__tests__/ChatPanel.test.tsx — verify 'full event sequence' test.
Verify ChatPanel integrates all components: messages rendered via For loop, assistant messages via MessageGroup, system messages via SystemMessage, user messages inline. Verify step-23 tests pass.

Write failing performance test: send 200 text_delta events in rapid succession, then fire rAF — verify all content is concatenated in a single flush, test completes within 500ms timeout. File: gui/src/__tests__/claudeStore.test.ts — add to 'rAF delta batching' describe block.

Verify rAF batching handles high token volume: buffer accumulates unbounded, single flush concatenates all. No implementation change expected — the existing rAF batching already handles this. Verify step-25 test passes.

design_decisions.decision: Use requestAnimationFrame for delta batching instead of debounce/throttle
design_decisions.rationale: rAF aligns with the browser's paint cycle, naturally achieving 60fps without artificial timers. Multiple deltas within one frame are concatenated and applied in a single store update, preventing excessive DOM re-renders.

design_decisions.decision: FIFO tool-result matching by tool name instead of by explicit tool call ID
design_decisions.rationale: The sidecar protocol's tool_result only carries tool_name, not a unique call ID. FIFO matching (first pending call with matching name) correctly handles interleaved same-name calls (A, B, A → results match in order). Locally-generated IDs (msg-{ts}-tc-{idx}) provide uniqueness for React keys.

design_decisions.decision: HTML-escape before markdown transforms in StreamingText
design_decisions.rationale: Security-first approach: all user/LLM content has HTML entities neutralized before any tags are introduced by the markdown renderer. This prevents XSS without needing a heavy sanitizer library.

design_decisions.decision: ThinkingBlock collapsed by default after completion
design_decisions.rationale: Thinking text is internal reasoning — typically long and less important to the user than the final response. Collapsed-by-default reduces visual noise while keeping content accessible via click.

design_decisions.decision: Abort button replaces send button position rather than appearing alongside
design_decisions.rationale: Prevents accidental sends during generation. The user's muscle memory for the send button location naturally maps to 'stop what you're doing' during active generation.

design_decisions.decision: Constraint result summary added to resultSummary() for reify_get_constraints
design_decisions.rationale: Task spec explicitly mentions 'e.g., 2 violated constraints' as a result summary example. Extending the existing resultSummary() function with an additional tool name check is minimal and consistent with the existing reify_get_parameters handler.

reuse.how: StreamingText uses createMemo(() => renderMarkdown(props.text)) to transform accumulated text to safe HTML. Already handles code blocks, bold, italic, headers, links, lists with XSS prevention.
DiffView component uses it to compute line-level diffs between before/after source for reify_update_source tool calls.
claudeStore uses it in the error handler to auto-classify error messages (auth, rate-limit, network, sidecar, unknown) and generate user-friendly system messages.
Immutable updates via produce() for nested message mutations (appending text, updating tool call status). batch() groups multiple setState calls to prevent intermediate renders.

All components use --reify-* CSS custom properties for colors (--reify-text, --reify-text-muted, --reify-accent, --reify-surface0, --reify-background, --reify-blue, --reify-peach, --reify-green, --reify-red) and --reify-font-mono for code styling.
Consistent UX pattern: role='button' div with tabindex=0, onClick/onKeyDown handlers toggling a createSignal(false), chevron character (▶/▼) indicating state, Show when=expanded for content.

OutboundMessage union type defines the streaming event protocol. claudeStore imports and switches on msg.type for all 7 event types (ready, text_delta, thinking_delta, tool_call, tool_result, done, error).

All component tests use render(() => <Component />), screen.getByTestId/queryByTestId, fireEvent.click/input. Store tests create store via factory function with vi.fn() callbacks. rAF tests mock globalThis.requestAnimationFrame.
